resources:
BChat Messenger Yes No Delete Ban Please wait... Save Note to Self Version %s
New message
\+%d
%d message per conversation
%d messages per conversation
Delete All Old Messages Now?
This will immediately trim all conversations to the most recent message.
This will immediately trim all conversations to the %d most recent messages.
Delete On Off
(image) (audio) (video) (reply)
Can\'t find an app to select media. BChat requires the Storage permission in order to attach photos, videos, or audio, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to the app settings menu, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Storage\". BChat requires Contacts permission in order to attach contact information, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to the app settings menu, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Contacts\". BChat requires the Camera permission in order to take photos, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to the app settings menu, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Camera\".
Error playing audio!
Today Yesterday This week This month
No web browser found.
Groups
Send failed, tap for details Received key exchange message, tap to process. %1$s has left the group. Send failed, tap for unsecured fallback Can\'t find an app able to open this media. Copied %s Read More Download More Pending
Add attachment Select contact info Sorry, there was an error setting your attachment. Write a message.... Compose Muted until %1$s Muted %1$d members Community Guidelines Welcome to BChat
Invalid recipient! Added to home screen Leave group? Are you sure you want to leave this group? Error leaving group Unblock this contact? You will once again be able to receive messages and calls from this contact. Unblock Attachment exceeds size limits for the type of message you\'re sending. Unable to record audio! There is no app available to handle this link on your device. Add members Join %s Are you sure you want to join the %s social group?
Allow Recorder to access voice recording? BChat needs microphone access to send audio messages, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to app settings, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Microphone\". BChat needs camera access to take photos and videos. Allow attachment to access Photos and videos on this Device? BChat needs camera access to take photos and videos, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to app settings, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Camera\". BChat needs camera access to take photos or videos.
%1$s %2$s %1$d of %2$d No results
%d unread message
%d unread messages
Delete selected message?
Delete selected messages?
This will permanently delete the selected message.
This will permanently delete all %1$d selected messages.
Ban this user? Save to Storage?
Saving this media to storage will allow any other apps on your device to access it.
Saving all %1$d media to storage will allow any other apps on your device to access them.
Error while saving attachment to storage!
Error while saving attachments to storage!
Saving attachment
Saving %1$d attachments
Saving attachment to storage...
Saving %1$d attachments to storage...
Pending... Data (BChat) MMS SMS Deleting Deleting messages... Banning Banning user… Original message not found Original message no longer available
Key exchange message
Profile photo
Using custom: %s Using default: %s None
Now %d min Today Yesterday
Today
Unknown file
Error while retrieving full resolution GIF
GIFs Stickers
Photo
C Tap and hold to record a voice message, release to send
Unable to find message Message from %1$s Your message
Media
Delete selected message?
Delete selected messages?
This will permanently delete the selected message.
This will permanently delete all %1$d selected messages.
Deleting Deleting messages... Documents Select all Collecting attachments...
Multimedia message Downloading MMS message Error downloading MMS message, tap to retry
Send to %s
Add a caption... An item was removed. Files must be less than 10MB. Camera unavailable. Message to %s
You can\'t share more than %d item.
You can\'t share more than %d items.
All media
Received a message encrypted using an old version of BChat that is no longer supported. Please ask the sender to update to the most recent version and resend the message. You left this group You updated the group %s updated the group
Disappearing messages Your messages will not expire Messages sent and received in this conversation will disappear %s after they have been seen.
Enter passphrase
Block this contact? You will no longer receive messages and calls from this contact. Block Unblock this contact? You will once again be able to receive messages and calls from this contact. Unblock Notification settings
Image Audio Video
Received corrupted key exchange message!
Received key exchange message for invalid protocol version.
Received message with new safety number. Tap to process and display. You reset the secure bchat. %s reset the secure bchat. Duplicate message.
Group updated Left the group Secure bchat reset. Draft: You called Called you Missed call Media message %s is on BChat! Disappearing messages disabled Disappearing message time set to %s %s took a screenshot. Media saved by %s. Safety number changed Your safety number with %s has changed. You marked verified You marked unverified This conversation is empty Social group invitation %s BDX %s
BChat update A new version of BChat is available, tap to update
Bad encrypted message Message encrypted for non-existing bchat
Bad encrypted MMS message MMS message encrypted for non-existing bchat
Mute notifications
Touch to open. BChat is unlocked Lock BChat
You Unsupported media type Draft BChat needs storage access in order to save to external storage, but it has been permanently denied. Please continue to app settings, select \"Permissions\", and enable \"Storage\". Unable to save to external storage without permissions Please wait until attachment has finished downloading Delete message? This will permanently delete this message.
%1$d new messages in %2$d conversations Most recent from: %1$s Locked message Message delivery failed. Failed to deliver message. Error delivering message. Mark all as read Mark read Reply Pending BChat messages You have pending BChat messages, tap to open and retrieve %1$s %2$s Contact
Default Calls Failures Backups Lock status App updates Other Messages Unknown
Quick response unavailable when BChat is locked! Problem sending message!
Saved to %s Saved
Search

BChat New message

%d Items

Block
Some issues need your attention. Sent Received Disappears Via To: From: With:
Create passphrase Select contacts Media preview
Use default Use custom
Mute for 1 hour Mute for 2 hours Mute for 1 day Mute for 7 days Mute forever
Settings default Enabled Disabled
Name and Content Name Only No Name or Content
Images Audio Video Documents
Small Normal Large Extra large
Default High Max
Small Medium Large
%d hour
%d hours
Enter Key sends Pressing the Enter key will send text messages Send link previews Previews are supported for Imgur, Instagram, Pinterest, Reddit, and YouTube links Screen security Block screenshots in the recents list and inside the app All Notifications LED color Unknown LED blink pattern Sound Silent Repeat alerts Never One time Two times Three times Five times Ten times Vibrate Green Red Blue Orange Cyan Magenta White None Fast Normal Slow Automatically delete older messages once a conversation exceeds a specified length Delete old messages Conversation length limit Trim all conversations now Scan through all conversations and enforce conversation length limits Default Incognito keyboard Read receipts If read receipts are disabled, you won\'t be able to see read receipts from others. Typing indicators If typing indicators are disabled, you won\'t be able to see typing indicators from others. Request keyboard to disable personalized learning Light Dark Message Trimming Use system emoji Disable BChat\'s built-in emoji support App Access Communication Chat Settings Messages In-chat sounds Show Priority Font Size Small Medium large Pay as you chat Wallet Enabling wallet will allow you to send and receive BDX Enabling \‘Pay As You Chat\’ will allow you to send and receive BDX right from the chat window
New message to...
Message details Copy text Delete message Ban user Ban and delete all Resend message Reply to message
Save attachment
Disappearing messages
Messages expiring
Unmute
Mute notification
Edit group Leave group All media Add to home screen
Expand popup
Delivery Conversation Broadcast
Save Forward All media
No document items to show!
Media preview
Deleting Deleting old messages... Old messages successfully deleted
Permission Required! Allow Deny Backups will be saved to external storage and encrypted with the passphrase below. You must have this passphrase in order to restore a backup. I have written down this passphrase. Without it, I will be unable to restore a backup. Skip Cannot import backups from newer versions of BChat Incorrect backup passphrase Enable local backups? Enable backups Please acknowledge your understanding by marking the confirmation check box. Delete backups? Disable and delete all local backups? Delete backups Copied to clipboard Creating backup... %d messages so far Never Screen lock Lock BChat access with Android screen lock or fingerprint Screen lock inactivity timeout None
Copy public key
Continue Copy Invalid URL Copied to clipboard Next Share Invalid BChat ID Cancel Ok Your BChat ID
Your BChat begins here... Create Account Restore Account
What\'s BChat? It\'s a decentralized, encrypted messaging app So it doesn\'t collect my personal information or my conversation metadata? How does it work? Using a combination of advanced anonymous routing and end-to-end encryption technologies. Friends don\'t let friends use compromised messengers. You\'re welcome.
Say hello to your BChat ID Your BChat ID is the unique address people can use to contact you on BChat. With no connection to your real identity, your BChat ID is totally anonymous and private by design.
Restore your account Enter the recovery phrase that was given to you when you signed up to restore your account. Enter your recovery phrase
Pick your display name This will be your name when you use BChat. It can be your real name, an alias, or anything else you like. Enter name Please pick a display name Please pick a shorter display name You can change it anytime :)
Recommended Please Pick an Option
You don\'t have any contacts yet Start a BChat Are you sure you want to leave this group? "Couldn\'t leave group" Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? Conversation deleted
Your Recovery Seed Meet your recovery phrase Your recovery phrase is the master key to your BChat ID — you can use it to restore your BChat ID if you lose access to your device. Store your recovery phrase in a safe place, and don\'t give it to anyone. Hold to reveal
You\'re almost finished! 80% Secure your account by saving your recovery phrase Tap and hold the redacted words to reveal your recovery phrase, then store it safely to secure your BChat ID. Make sure to store your recovery phrase in a safe place
Hops BChat masks your IP address by routing your messages through several masternodes in the Beldex decentralized network. Your connection is currently routed through the following masternodes You Entry Node Master Node Destination Learn More Resolving…
New Chat Enter BChat ID Scan QR Code Scan a user\'s QR code to start a BChat. QR codes can be found by tapping the QR code icon in account settings.
Enter BChat ID Users can share their BChat ID by going into their account settings and tapping "Share BChat ID", or by sharing their QR code. Please check the BChat ID or BNS name and try again.
BChat needs camera access to scan QR codes Grant Camera Access
New Secret Group Enter a group name No Contacts yet. Start a Chat Please enter a group name Please enter a shorter group name Please pick at least 1 group member A secret group cannot have more than 100 members
Join a Social Group Couldn\'t join social group Social Group URL Scan QR Code Scan the QR code of the social group you\'d like to join
Enter a social group URL
Settings Enter a display name Please pick a display name Please pick a shorter display name Privacy Notifications Chat Settings Devices Invite a Friend FAQ Recovery Seed Clear Data Clear Data Including Network Help us Translate BChat Message Requests
Notifications Notification Style Notification Content
Privacy
Chats
Notification Strategy Use Fast Mode You’ll be notified of new messages reliably and immediately using Google’s notification servers.
Change name Unlink device
Your Recovery Seed This is your recovery seed. With it, you can restore or migrate your BChat ID to a new device.
Clear all data Are you sure you want to Permanently clear all data from this device? Are you sure you want to Permanently clear all data from the Beldex Network? Delete Only Entire Account
QR Code My QR Code Scan QR Scan someone\'s QR code to start a conversation with them Scan Me
This is your QR code. Other users can scan it to start a BChat with you. Share QR Code
Contacts Secret Groups Social Groups You don\'t have any contacts yet
Apply Done
Edit Group Enter a new group name Members Add Members Group name can\'t be empty Please enter a shorter group name Groups must have at least 1 group member
Remove user from group
Select Contacts
Secure BChat reset done
Theme Day Night System default
Copy BChat ID
Attachment Voice Message Details
Failed to activate backups. Please try again or contact support.
Restore backup Select a file Select a backup file and enter the passphrase it was created with. 30-digit passphrase
This is taking a while, would you like to skip? Link a Device Recovery Seed Scan QR Code Navigate to Settings → Recovery Seed on your other device to show your QR code. Or join one of these…
Message Notifications There are two ways BChat can notify you of new messages. Fast Mode Slow Mode You’ll be notified of new messages reliably and immediately using Google’s notification servers. BChat will occasionally check for new messages in the background.
BChat is Locked Tap to Unlock
Enter a nickname Invalid public key
Document
Unblock %s? Are you sure you want to unblock %s?
Join %s? Are you sure you want to join the %s social group?
Open URL? Are you sure you want to open %s? Open Copy Link
Enable Link Previews? Enabling link previews will show previews for URLs you send and receive. This can be useful, but BChat will need to contact linked websites to generate previews. You can always disable link previews in BChat\'s settings. Enable
Trust %s? Are you sure you want to download media sent by %s? Download
%s is blocked. Unblock them?
Failed to prepare attachment for sending. Media Tap to download %s Error
Warning This is your recovery seed. If you send it to someone they will have full access to your account. Send All Mentions This message has been deleted Delete just for me Delete for everyone Delete for me and %s Feedback Debug Log Share Logs Would you like to export your application logs to be able to share for troubleshooting? Pin Unpin Mark all as read Contacts and Groups Messages
Terms & Conditions Hey there! Chat Anonymously Now. Ut Commodo venenatis diam id accumsan. Morbi ut pur us egestas, facilisis mi ac, rhoncus. Morbi ut purus egtas. AppLockActivity
First Fragment Second Fragment Previous
Hello first fragment Hello second fragment. Arg: %1$s Hey User, Welcome to BChat! BChat ID Next Enable App Lock Later Enable Eg.0089 bd00f9b10ec366631ba25a9c6a0279e12d93c260134fce646d4c425356da5c9b48 Note: Ut Commodo venenatis diam id accumsan. Morbi ut pur us egestas, facilisis mi ac, rhoncus. Morbi ut Re-enter your password Close On IMPORTANT App Lock Change Password Screenlock Inactivity Timeout Entered pin not matched Start a Chat No Contacts yet. Join Social Group Group URL Or Join here BChat needs camera access to scan QR codes Remove This Contacts ? Are you sure You want to Remove this contact from this group? Leave Create Change Enter a New Password Enter Your Old Password BChat app lock password adds an additional layer of security to users. Enter your old password and new password to update your password in app lock.
None 30 seconds 1 Minute 2 Minutes 5 Minutes 15 Minutes 30 Minutes
Yippie! Your BChat is being set up! Scan Beldex Address bx00f9b10ec366631ba25a9c6a0279e12d93c260134fce646d4c425356da5c9b480987654321a7b8c9e7a4d1b6f9e9e8 Welcome to BChat, your private haven for seamless communication and connection. Welcome to Set your Display Name Your display name is not your username and you can change it anytime. Your BChat ID is like your username. You can share it with your friends to begin a conversation. Your Beldex address is connected to your BChat ID. You can use this address to receive BDX. Enter a four digit pin to add an additional layer of security to your BChat account. Your pin is required to unlock your account or view your recovery keys and recovery seed once you\'re logged in. Note: Save your recovery seed! Only your recovery seed can be used to recover your account on another device. Copy the recovery seed to continue. Share your BChat ID with your friends. You can find your BChat ID below. Never share your seed with anyone! Your seed can be used to restore your account. Never share it with anyone or store a digital copy of it. Never enter your seed in any other website or application other than BChat or the Beldex official wallet. Check your surroundings to ensure no one is overlooking. Do you want to proceed? Yes, I\'m Safe :) Enter your Seed Enter your four digit pin to unlock your account Enter your password to view your seed. Write it down on paper. Enter your password to view your restore key. Write it down on paper. Uh oh, you don\'t have any contacts yet.\nAdd some contacts first to start a secret group. Social groups are similar to public groups, however, you need an invite link to join. Join a social group using the group\'s URL. If you don\'t know the restore blockheight, you can skip it. If you don\'t know the restore date, you can skip it. Changelog Enter your password Navigate to voice message · %1$s %1$d:%2$02d Pause voice message Play voice message Profile Name Your BChat ID is copied to clipboard Your Beldex Address is copied to clipboard Copy and Save the seed to continue You have a new message request Message Requests Message Request Sending a message to this user will automatically accept their message request and reveal your BChat ID. Accept Decline Clear All Are you sure you want to delete this request? Message request deleted Are you sure you want to clear all message requests? Message requests deleted Your message request has been accepted. You have accepted the message request from %s. Your message request is currently pending. No pending message requests Accept All Clear Are you sure you want to accept this request? Declining this request will permanently block this user, are you sure? No blocked contacts yet Blocked Contacts
Call Missed You missed a call because you need to enable the \'Voice and video calls\' permission in the Privacy Settings. Connecting… Incoming call Deny call Answer call Establishing call Cancel call Person in call End call Bchat Call Reconnecting… Call Call Permissions Required You missed a call because you need to enable the \'Voice and video calls\' permission in the privacy Settings. Voice/Video Calls The current implementation of voice / video calls will expose your IP address to the Beldex servers and the calling / called user Notifications Having notifications disabled will prevent you from receiving calls, go to Bchat notification settings? Dismiss Voice and video calls Allow access to accept voice and video calls from other users Incoming Call.. Outgoing Call Calling.. End to End Encrypted 00:10:10 Hangup Back to call Call in progress Call Muted Video Paused Video paused and microphone off Call Declined If user decline the call show call declined status. Dialing… Call Ended Receive Rescan Enter amount Current Blockheight Restore from height Restore from date New Node Node address Node port Username (Optional) Node name (Optional) Password (Optional) Clear Node Address Book %1$s priority is set as the default fee.\nGo to setting to change the transaction priority. 0.0000 Beldex Send
1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 0 Forgot? Disable %d-digit Pincode Create Pin Enter your current %d-digit Pincode Enter Pin Re-Enter Pin
Fingerprint Fingerprint recognized Fingerprint not recognized. Try again
tx_transition_%1$s %1$s %1$s %1$s (%1$s) failed <span style=\"background-color: #%1$s; color: #%2$s;\"> %3$s </span>%4$s BChat Wallet Service Loading Wallet … Connecting … Disconnected
receive_transition send_transition scan_transition I don\'t know what you want! No camera = No QR scanning! Not a valid payment QR code Not a QR Code Wallet saved Wallet save failed! Transaction failed: %1$s Node connection failed!\nCheck username/password Node version incompatible - please upgrade! Scanning: + %1$s BDX Ledger balance Blocks remaining Synced: Rescan I am still busy with your last wallet … Wallets are loading …\nPlease wait...
CONNECTION ERROR %1$d CONNECTION ERROR AUTHENTICATION FAILED Last Block: %1$d seconds ago Last Block: %1$d minutes ago Last Block: %1$d hours ago Last Block: %1$d days ago New Passphrase for %1$s Repeat Passphrase for %1$s Password for %1$s You can also open wallet using fingerprint.\nPlease touch sensor. Opening the wallet… Fingerprint not recognized. Try again. Incorrect password! Saved password is incorrect.\nPlease enter password manually. Wallet does not exist! Node must be set! Wallet does not match selected net Testing IP: %1$s …
Hello blank fragment Height: %1$s (v%2$d), Ping: %3$.0fms, IP: %4$s Non-BDX payments enabled, tap for more info. Ledger enabled, tap for more info. Restoring already in progress… Node scanning only for mainnet! Switch Node Are you sure you want to Switch to another node? SendActivityNew
Filter By Incoming Outgoing Transactions by Date Failed Pending Sent Received Private Notes (optional) Generate Scan Spend my sweet Beldex Spend my sweet Beldex (%1$s) Not a valid address OpenAlias address not available OpenAlias secure ✔ Resolving OpenAlias… OpenAlias without DNSSEC - address may be spoofed Send %1$s BDX Address Amount Confirm Done %1$s BDX My Wallet Synchronized send_btn_transition receive_btn_transition Test Test result : Height 1,500,500 (V17),Ping: 500ms, IP: 15.222.187.192
Node-o-matiC enabled, tap for more info. Last block updated: %1$s Nodes Node Name (Optional) Hostname Port Username (Optional) Password (Optional) Cannot resolve host We need this! Must be numeric Must be 1–65535 Add Node Touch to refresh! Test Result: Please wait for scan to finish Touch to select or add nodes Add nodes manually or pull down to scan Scanning network… Automatically bookmarked best %1$d nodes Test Info about Wallet Password generation To access your wallet, you will first need to generate a wallet password. Your wallet password can be used to access your wallet within BChat and authenticate your transactions. You can generate a wallet password only by restoring your account. If you wish to continue, click “proceed.” Proceed
Note: Copy your Recovery Seed and save it. You will need the Recovery Seed to restore your account and generate a wallet password. \nIf you lose your seed, you will permanently lose access to your account. Do you wish to continue to sign-in and restore your account? This is the PIN you set to your BChat account. Enter your PIN to verify Please pick a restore height Please pick a restore from date
Create Transaction Error Transaction Successful! ✔ Payment ID integrated Enter wallet address Enter the BDX amount to send Confirm Sending Address : Commit Transaction Amount : Fee : Estimated Fee: %1$s BDX %1$.2f %2$s Enter a valid amount Can\'t connect to nodes. Check your internet New Chat Secret Group Social Group Display Balance As Current Node Wallet Decimals Enable Fiat Currency Conversion Currency Fee Priority Save Recipient Address Change Pin No record found No address found Transaction ID Payment ID Date & Time : Height : Transaction Fee : Recipient Address : Please check your internet connection OR Restore from Blockheight Restore from Date Wallet Name View Key (private) Spend Key (private) Scan Wallet Password Your Recovery Seed can be used to recover your account. If you lose your Recovery Seed, you will lose access to your account. Restoring your account will only restore the messages and BChat contacts from the last 14 days. Success Connection error Exit Are you sure you want to exit the wallet? Transaction Initiated Successfully Enter the block height or date at which you created the wallet. Block Height Blockheight is the block number in a blockchain at a given time. Enter the block height at which you created the wallet for fast synchronization. Enter Address or BNS name Enter BDX Amount Amount Enter a valid blockheight Enter blockheight less than current blockheight. New pin and old pin can\'t be same, Please enter a different pin Failed to connect to the node Reconnecting... Switching Node… Once its finished please reopen the wallet! Make sure you have copied the seed! Your PIN has been set up successfully! Sync Info However we recommend to scan the blockchain from the block height at which you created the wallet, to get all the transactions and correct balance Can\'t rescan while wallet is syncing Enter a valid height Not enough money Make sure you test the node before adding it. Unable to connect. Test failed. Search by Name... Please add a mainnet node Wallet Syncing.. If you close the wallet, synchronization will be paused. Are you sure you want to exit the wallet? Your PIN has been changed successfully! Transaction Details Please try again later No Transactions yet! After your first transaction,\nyou will be able to view it here. Waiting for network.. Waiting for connection.. Fetching Balance Report Issue Filter applied Testing the node... start date end date Please enter from date Please enter to date Video Resumed Block User Are you sure you want to decline this message request? Are you sure you want to block this request?
Unblock %s Unblock Users Are you sure you want to unblock %s?
and %d other
and %d others
Unblock selected You\'re already on call Please connect to other node Please try after some time conversation_transition In-Chat Payment Pay as you chat Balance : Unlocked Balance : Current Height : Wallet : BDX Sent Successfully Received Successfully Payment Sent Payment Received %1s : %2s BDX Open Link Initiating Transaction.. Invalid destination address Search people and groups You can\'t send messages to this group because you\'re no longer a participant. Can\'t send empty message Swipe to send BDX Search Currency Enter a valid nickname Amount Failed to connect to node Receiver address is not available Hold to Enable Pay as you chat Connected No connection Please enter your 4 digit PIN. Invalid Password. Please copy and save your seed Please copy the seed and save it Setup Pin Setup Please set up wallet pin to enable pay as you chat feature. Save your seed You haven\'t copied the seed phrase. Kindly copy and save the seed. Only your seed can be used to recover your account. Joined %s successfully Can\'t record voice messages during a BChat call. Failed to Connect Invalid QR Code Hey, I\'ve been using BChat to chat securely and confidentially. Come join me! Download it at https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.beldex.bchat. My Chat ID is %s ! ID: %s Chats Profile Picture Upload Remove Picture Please enter a restore height or Select a restore date Please pick a restore date You restored via Seed! Please enter a valid name It seems there is an issue with connecting to the node, please try to reconnect or switch the node. We recommend you to allow permission for notifications for BChat app to notify you for new messages and calls. Unable to recognized a valid code from uploaded image Upload from gallery Scan a Social group\'s QR code for Joining a social group. QR Codes can be found on the social group website link. Scan a receiver\'s QR code to send BDX. QR Codes can be found by clicking on receiver button in Wallet Dashboard. Can\'t rescan or reconnect while wallet is syncing You don\'t have enough balance Enable wallet start option in My Account Home screen is restarting for the wallet setup process... Please wait until it is complete You can Send and Receive BDX with the BChat integrated wallet. The ‘Pay as you Chat’ feature is an easy-pay feature. You can send BDX to your friends right from the chat window The BChat wallet is beta. Constant updates are released in newer versions of the app to enhance the integrated wallet functionality. You can enable or disable the wallet using the Start wallet feature under Settings > Wallet settings. Yes, I Understand Enable Wallet Please enter a node address Clear Data Delete entire account Clear only in device Delete account from Network Back Enter Block height to Restore Select Date Pick a restore height Pick a Date Display Name Enter name Copied! My Account Clear only in device Delete Entire Account Delete account from network Enter your PIN Enter Old PIN Enter New PIN Re-Enter your PIN Incorrect password entered New password should not be same as old password. Password does not match. Screen Inactivity Timeout JoinPublicNewChatScreen CreateSecretGroupScreen CreateNewPrivateChatScreen StartWalletInfoScreen About Recovery Seed Create Password Verify PIN Enter your 4 digit BChat PIN No Pending message Requests! Create Secret Group Enter Secret Group name Search Contact Search Message Request Do you want to block or just delete this user? Or Join Let\'s BChat Your Chat ID Enter Chat ID or BNS Name Restore Account Hello, We\'re thrilled to have you on board! Restore Seed Restore from Seed Restore Password created successfully. Password changed successfully. Copy and save the seed to continue Restore Seed Register Hey %1$s, welcome to BChat! Copy your Recovery Seed and keep it safe. Copy Seed Menu BChat v%s Create Transaction Error Beldex address or BNS name Enter Address or BNS name This allows user to paste their seed from clipboard Please don\'t close this window or attend calls or navigate to another app until the transaction gets initiated Select Date Range Wallet settings Transactions Transaction Filter Chat Clear Data From Device Delete data on this device Delete data from the network Add Refresh nodes Are your sure you want to refresh the nodes? By date No Addresses! Save address to show! Voice Call Missed Voice Call Tap to Callback Enter your 4 digit Wallet PIN Clear Chat Are you sure you want to clear all the chat from this contact? Unblock Contact Are you sure you want to Unblock this contact? Are you sure you want to Block this contact? Block contact Unblock You Blocked Person! Click here to Unblock. Both passwords should be same. Incorrect password. Dark Mode Call Permission Required! You can enable the ‘Voice and video calls\' permission in the Privacy Settings. Wallet Setup Message delivery status Delete Item? Are you sure you want to delete the media from device? All Media Verifying... No Contacts Syncing Option Reconnect Rescan Invalid BNS Account Settings Delete Conversation? Accept Request? Decline Request? Joined %1$s Social Group Successfully open url Message Payment Status Link Your BNS Read more about BNS Show QR About BNS Scan QR code • Unified Identity: Connect your BChat ID, Beldex Wallet Address, and BelNet ID to a single BNS name. This simplifies your interactions across the Beldex ecosystem. • Ease of Use: Say goodbye to complicated alphanumeric strings. With your BNS name, messaging and transactions become straightforward and user-friendly. • Badge of Trust: Link your BChat ID to your BNS name and complete the verification process to earn a BNS badge. This badge adds a layer of trust and recognition within the community. Enter BNS name Verify Verified Link Your BNS name and ID does not match.Try again BNS Linked Successfully! BNS verified tag BNS name changed!>\nRe-verify your BNS name to proceed. Apply Changes Please enter a different name Edit Group Name Forward Verify Password Incorrect PIN. Both PINs should be same. Create PIN New PIN should not be same as old PIN. Full Screen Notification Allow BChat to show full screen notifications for incoming calls and other notifications when the device is locked Archived Chats Archive Settings Archive Chat Unarchive Chat Keep chats archived Archived chats will remain archived when you receive a new message These chats stay archived when new messages are received. Tap to change These chats stay unarchived when new messages are received. Tap to change Un Archived Chats Block Request? Delete Request? Call Missed from "%1$s" because you needed to enable the ‘Voice and video calls’ permission in the privacy settings. Mute Notification Disappearing Messages Record Permission Required! Edit New Message Details Wallet is fully synchronized Change PIN You can\'t send an audio message while you\'re on a call Camera Option Gallery Option Document Option Gif Option Search GIFs? You will not have full metadata protection when sending GIFs. %s needs camera access to take photos and videos, but it has been permanently denied. Tap Settings → Permissions, and turn \"Camera\" on. This Message Recently Used Smileys & People Nature Food Activities Places Objects Symbols Flags Emoticons No results found
All · %1$d
+%1$d
You %1$s reacted to a message %2$s Show less Search emoji Back to emoji Clear search entry
